\tzpentry{ID4417}{Quantum Density Divergence Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4417 introduces Quantum Density Divergence Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \partial_t \rho = \nabla\cdot(\nabla V_{\pi}\,\rho + D_{\pi} \nabla\rho) + \frac{1}{i\hbar}\,[\Hhat_{\mathrm{ent}},\rho]. \end{equation}
